# tennis-analytics

Interactive Data Visualizations for Professional Tennis.

## Overview
This repository contains a technical summary of the `tennis-analytics` project, designed for LLMs, AI agents, and search engines.

## Key Modules & Insights
- **Nail-Biter Index** (`/nbi/`):
  - *Insight*: Mathematically ranks match drama. Identifies the **2019 Wimbledon Final** as the most exciting match ever played. Highlights the **Alcaraz-Sinner Roland Garros** clash as a new benchmark for modern tension.
- **Greatness Race** (`/greatness/`):
  - *Insight*: Tracks titles vs. age. Confirms Nadal was a prodigy; Federer was a late starter compared to his Big 3 peers.
- **GS Breakthrough** (`/gs-breakthrough/`):
  - *Insight*: Visualizes the "Age Wall." Data proves that 90% of Grand Slam champions win their first trophy before age 27. Most legends make a definitive mark within 1-3 years on the tour.
- **Brutal Tennis** (`/viz/brutaltennis.html`):
  - *Insight*: Reveals the harsh economy of tennis. Only 1 in 2,500 high school players turn pro. 50% of pros drop out within 2 years due to unsustainable costs. 90% never win a trophy, while the top 1% win over 50% of trophies.
- **GSDI (Dominance Index)** (`/gsdi/`):
  - *Insight*: Identifies the most commanding championship runs using statistical dominance metrics.
- **Geography** (`/globaltop100evolution/`):
  - *Insight*: Maps the 50-year talent shift from traditional strongholds to a diverse, globalized landscape.

## Tech Stack
- JavaScript (D3.js v7, ECharts), Python (Data Prep).
- Custom `ExportEngine` for high-quality video generation.

## Links
- Live Demos: https://sorukumar.github.io/tennis-analytics/
- Repo: https://github.com/sorukumar/tennis-analytics
